Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 40287 — NICEPHORUS I with STAURACIUS, 802-811. AV Solidus (4.43 gms), Constantinople Mint, 803-811. NGC Ch AU, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 3/5. Brushed, Edge Bend.

sales.description:
NICEPHORUS I with STAURACIUS, 802-811. AV Solidus (4.43 gms), Constantinople Mint, 803-811. NGC Ch AU, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 3/5. Brushed, Edge Bend.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
S-1604. Obverse: Crowned facing bust of Nicephorus, wearing chlamys and holding cross potent and akakia; pellet at beginning of legend; Reverse: Crowned facing bust of Stauracius, wearing chlamys and holding globus cruciger and akakia; X at end of legend. Sharply struck and allur...
